mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material(code, name, category_id, specification, unit, purchase_price, sell_price, min_stock, max_stock, description) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{purchasePrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE material SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM material WHERE code=#{code} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM material WHERE is_deleted=0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM material WHERE category_id=#{categoryId} AND is_deleted=0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM material WHERE is_deleted=0 AND (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT m.* FROM material m LEFT JOIN stock s ON m.id = s.material_id WHERE m.is_deleted=0 GROUP BY m.id HAVING COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) < m.min_stock
